project.name: GateGrave-bot-System
project.summary: Event-driven Discord RPG backend with canonical runtime path, broad subsystem scaffolds, persistence adapter boundary, and Stage 13/14 command-to-runtime integration hardening.

active_objectives: Enforce canonical runtime event path for command handling
Improve persistence consistency and rollback safety
Prepare stable foundation for content expansion and possible combat redesign
recently_completed: Router unknown-event fallback removed; structured routing failure now returned
Controller handlers modularized into world/session/combat/controller modules
Ping command routed through canonical runtime/controller path
Runtime async-safe event flow and gateway safe fallback handling verified
Aggregate Stage 13/14 CI scripts available in root package.json

hard_rules: Systems should not call each other directly for gameplay outcomes
Inventory mutation occurs through canonical inventory system

capabilities: Discord client boot and command registration
Slash command definitions for read/bootstrap/action flows
Canonical runtime integration for command processing
Safe fallback reply path when runtime/controller throws
notes: Ping is routed through runtime/controller path and no longer special-cased as direct gameplay logic

capabilities: Incoming event validation for supported command events
Deterministic routing by target_system and event_type
Async-safe publish support for sync and async handlers
Orchestrator processing chained emitted events until completion

notes: Recent hardening focused on safer /use item failure behavior and consistency

implemented: Room model and session room helpers
Party movement and room entry resolution
Dungeon harness and first playable loop harness

character: adapters to combat and dungeon shapes

stage13.summary: Gateway slash command layer and canonical event mappings completed for read/bootstrap/session/action command set.

stage14.summary: Runtime integration for read/start/equip/unequip/session lifecycle/active action command flows through canonical path.
known_hardening_work: continue consistency checks on multi-write persistence flows
keep rollback-safe mutation order in critical actions

aggregate_scripts.test:stage14: gateway + runtime + persistence + playable loop + hardening

high_priority: Multi-entity persistence writes still need ongoing consistency and rollback hardening
Combat redesign decision could invalidate current combat scaffolds if scope changes significantly
medium_priority: Keep event payload contracts stable as new content is added
Avoid introducing alternate non-canonical execution paths
Maintain parity across in-memory and sqlite behavior
low_priority: Consolidate documentation and remove stale historical status files later

next_recommended_steps: Run npm run test:stage14 after each integration/hardening chunk
Run npm run test:all before milestone merges
Produce a combat redesign decision memo (keep/replace/migrate plan)
Lock canonical event contracts for content phase command additions
Expand persistence parity tests where split-write paths remain

quick_handoff_prompt.usage: Paste this JSON into ChatGPT, then ask for a milestone-by-milestone implementation plan that preserves canonical event flow and persistence safety.
quick_handoff_prompt.example: Using this system status, propose a phased plan for content phase while preserving Stage 14 runtime architecture and adding combat redesign safely.
